proof_commands.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_all_targets CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_PROFILE_DEV_DEBUG=0 RUSTFLAGS='-C debuginfo=0' cargo check -p asupersync --all-targets
proof_commands.expected_signal: cargo check exits 0 or records the first unrelated all-target blocker
exit code 0 with 'ATP Dependency Audit PASSED' message

proof_commands.expected_signal: clippy exits 0 or records the first lint frontier blocker
